one_liner: Plain is a B2B support/helpdesk platform exposing a full self-serve GraphQL API with API-key auth and an official OAuth-based MCP server, making it readily buildable for agent tooling today.

auth_methods.notes: Machine Users generate API keys with fine-grained permissions; used as Bearer token in Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer plainApiKey_xxx).
The official hosted MCP server (mcp.plain.com/mcp) authenticates via OAuth using your existing Plain account, no manual API key needed.

self_serve_notes: Free tier (3 seats, 1,000 threads/month) includes API access; API keys self-generated via Settings > Machine Users, no credit card required to start.

api_surface.notes: Full GraphQL API (core-api.uk.plain.com/graphql/v1) with no limitations vs the UI; typed TypeScript SDK also available.

evidence.supports: API key generation via Machine Users and Bearer token auth scheme
Full GraphQL API details, endpoint URL, schema access, and reference to MCP server
Free tier with self-serve signup and API access, no credit card required
